privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated watchlist containing NVDA data to populate JStock. The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/NVDA_chart.png. The verifier requires the exported image to be in PNG format with a minimum file size of 5000 bytes. The virtual desktop resolution is 1920x1080, and the verifier explicitly checks the output dimensions against these exact dimensions to ensure the chart was properly exported rather than simply captured via a full-screen screenshot.
